
## osuAPI-js - the most powerful osu! API wrapper
[![Documentation Status](https://readthedocs.org/projects/osuapi-js/badge/?version=latest)](http://osuapi-js.readthedocs.io/en/latest/?badge=latest) ![Completion](https://img.shields.io/badge/completion-38%25-orange.svg)<br>
[![NPM](https://nodei.co/npm/osuapi-js.png)](https://nodei.co/npm/osuapi-js/)

## Warning
Module is not finished yet, as for now it only supports getting info about specific user, beatmap and beatmap set *BUT* it's being constantly updated and gets better with each commit.

## Why osuAPI?
- Object-oriented
- Fully Promise-based
- Constantly updated
- Flexible

## Features
- [x] Basic osu! API coverage
- [x] Complete typings with explanations
- [x] PP calculation
- [ ] Gathering information from the website
- [ ] Bancho support

...and more to come!<br>
(If you have any requests or suggestions, feel free to open an Issue or Pull request!)

## Installation
```
$ npm install osuapi-js
$ npm test
```
Super easy!

## Usage
You can read the docs [here](http://osuapi-js.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)
